goal: Build a surface-gripper gantry: Franka mounted on a linear-axis slider with surface_gripper for vacuum pickup. Realizes #29 SurfaceGripperGantry infrastructure.
thoughts:
Six gantry specifics for CP-62:
1) Franka at standard mount.
2) Linear-axis slider /World/Franka_Slider — prismatic joint allowing X-axis travel ±1.0m.
3) surface_gripper installed on Franka panda_hand (vacuum pickup).
4) 4 cubes on conveyor — robot picks via vacuum + slides along gantry to drop.
5) Bin at far +X side (gantry travel reaches it).
6) Realizes #29 infrastructure. Runtime gantry control + suction toggle is Sprint 4+.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Linear-axis slider
create_linear_axis_robot(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    slider_path="/World/GantrySlider",
    axis=[1, 0, 0],
    limit_lower=-1.0,
    limit_upper=1.0,
)

# Surface gripper on Franka end-effector
surface_gripper(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    ee_link="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    grip_threshold=0.01,
    force_limit=100.0,
    torque_limit=100.0,
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.6, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin", "/World/GantrySlider"],
)
extension_notes: CP-62 combines surface_gripper (CP-54) + linear_axis_robot (gantry). Realizes #29 SurfaceGripperGantry infrastructure. Runtime gantry slide control + suction-on-pickup logic is Sprint 4+.
failure_modes: Gantry slider doesn't actually move robot — slider prim is independent. Real gantry would parent robot to slider.
Surface gripper + parallel gripper coexist on same hand. Pickup mechanism depends on which activates first.
Bin at +0.6m — within Franka reach without gantry travel needed for canonical demo.
